fullText:
Codex 更新了，现在你可以在 Codex 里直接使用 GPT Live 实时的语音模型。

相较于手机端来说，这个体验简直太爽了！

你完全可以脱离键盘等任何输入设备，纯语音跟 Codex 交互。

比如你戴个带个 AirPods，就可以在家里的任何地方和它对话，用语音询问它生成的结果。

它还可以帮你执行 Codex 上的任何命令，这意味着你所有的 vibe coding 都可以脱离键盘和按键，只靠说话来完成了。

它会一直处于待命状态。如果你像官方演示那样，放个投影或者把电脑连接到电视上，就可以边干活、边玩游戏或做其他事。

即使是上厕所，你都能随时掌握你的 Codex 进度。我刚才简单试了一下，真的很爽！

fullText:
HOW HUAWEI IS USING PSEUDO 3D CIRCUITS TO BYPASS TRANSISTOR LIMITATIONS

Huawei is shifting chip design away from transistor size reduction and toward quasi 3D circuitry.

Here are 3 points about their new LogicFolding approach. 

1: This architectural shift leverages time based scaling to unlock higher compute density.

They talk a lot about their new scaling law. 

2: Managing thermal crowding is the challenge for such vertical chip design.

3: Semiconductor competition is evolving from heavy equipment purchasing to creative architecture and smart algorithmic routing.

Read here for more. 

#TechStrategy #SemiconductorInnovation #ChipDesign

https://t.co/Tgqr01zIaz

user.name: Jeffrey Towson 陶迅
user.description: I help increase online growth and strengthen digital AI moats. Digital & AI mgmt consultant. Get my free email and Tech Strategy podcast.

fullText:
CAN ROBOTS BE EMOTIONAL COMPANIONS?

At WAIC 2026, Fourier unveiled their GR Nano robot.

The Nano is a desktop-sized companion with emotional interactions.

It follows your voice and turns toward you when you speak.

It has micro-expressions and voice changes for emotional responses.

It reacts to touch (e.g., patting its head can trigger starry-eye effects or other cute reactions).

Price: $140

Fourier is an interesting robot biz. 

Founded in 2015, it began with exoskeletons and rehab devices used in hospitals and care centers.

Over time, Fourier had blended rehab-honed safety and precision with designs for close human care. 

The business has a compelling human-centric and care-focused design philosophy.

fullText:
Most company chatbots end with an answer.
GoalOS Chat Ω begins there.

Introducing the verified AI front door for every company—designed to understand customers, apply enterprise rules, retrieve approved knowledge, and turn conversation into completed work.

When an answer is enough, GoalOS answers—with evidence.

When action is required, it launches AGI Jobs:

→ define the mission
→ establish acceptance criteria
→ orchestrate agents, tools and systems
→ execute bounded work
→ verify the result
→ preserve the audit trail
→ deliver the outcome
→ learn only from what passed

Every interaction can become a real mission.

Every completed mission can create reusable capability.

Every verified capability can make the next interaction better.

One front door.
Every customer.
From conversation to verified action.

The decacorn-to-megacorn thesis:

Replace every company chatbot worldwide with GoalOS—the AI front door that doesn’t merely talk, but launches AGI Jobs and gets real work done.

#GoalOS #AGIJobs #EnterpriseAI #AgenticAI #MontrealAI

fullText: About 70% of America’s leading AI researchers are foreign‑born or foreign‑educated. The U.S. AI engine runs on global talent, it always has. Chinese AI talent, by contrast, is now returning in large numbers: recent analyses suggest roughly 70% of top Chinese AI researchers with overseas experience end up back in China, reversing an earlier pattern of near‑universal stay in the U.S.
